description: A demo fractional asset referencing vaulted silver bullion inventory with auditable bar records and transferable on-chain shares. The asset does not claim fixed yield; valuation is intended to follow issuance and market transaction data.

docs.label: Custody statement
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes illustrative vaulted silver custody and bar-list controls.

docs.label: Inventory report
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Shows demo inventory references and reconciliation assumptions.
